name: Godly Adoption—Starhenge’s Ruins
description:
CHARACTER BIOS

CHARACTER #1: Galvana

Age: Infinite (seemingly 30)

Height: 6’2”

Personality: Wise, loving

Accent: None

Physical Appearance

Has freckled blue skin, orange eyes, spiky orange hair, wearing a yellow dress with a collar shaped like lightning bolts and an orange front, yellow gauntlets that look much like her daughter’s, yellow stilettos with orange soles, and thick cyan eyelashes.

Celestial of: Electricity

CHARACTER #2: Attmoz

Age: Infinite (seemingly 49)

Height: 6’8”

Personality: Energetic, happy

Accent: None

Physical Appearance

Has hot pink skin, fluffy white hair with light purple accents, one yellow eye, a massive white neck fluff, a long purple tail with two blue bands, wearing a yellow star on his cheek, a torn purple shirt with the Air symbol on it, baggy purple pants, a long cape made out of Air clouds, and white socks with purple stripes.

Celestial of: Air

CHARACTER #3: Syncopite

Age: Infinite (seemingly 19)

Height: 5’10”

Personality: Rapper-like

Accent: None

Physical Appearance

Has brown eyes, hair in the form of jade crystals, neck covered in the same crystals, a body covered in dark stone, dark stones floating around his hair, wearing a gold necklace with a circular pendant, gold rings on his fingers, a stone mouth covering with a golden front, and dark stone shoes with jade crystal tops.

Celestial of: Crystal

CHARACTER #4: Scaratar

Age: Infinite (seemingly 42)

Height: 5’7”

Personality: Kind, caring

Accent: Spanish

Physical Appearance

Has grey skin, grey hair done into a bun, beautiful green eyes, thick eyelashes, green-colored arms and legs, wearing dark brown shorts and a dark brown t-shirt, a red back covering shaped like a ladybug’s shell, a wedding ring with a maroon gem on her finger, and green socks.

Celestial of: Poison

CHARACTER #5: Loodvigg

Age: Infinite (seemingly 40)

Height: 7’0”

Personality: Polite

Accent: British

Physical Appearance

Has dark maroon skin, long red-and-yellow with the red parts done into big horns, black eyes with white iris, an additional set of arms, another set of legs, wearing a yellow neck fluff, a hot pink dress shirt with a white jabot, a maroon cape, black pants with maroon stripes, and a wedding ring with a poison-colored gem.

Celestial of: Shadow

CHARACTER #6: Hornacle

Age: Infinite (seemingly 10)

Height: 5’6”

Personality: Childlike

Accent: none

Physical Appearance

Has light blue skin, curious light blue eyes, a head shaped like a star with three horns under his chin, red hair, his right arm replaced by a red crab claw, several shells and ship parts on his back, a missing leg replaced by a sharp ivory peg, wearing a black pirate jacket, a black pirate hat, a black eyepatch, black pants with red underlines, and a collar made of sea kelp.

Celestial of: Water

CHARACTER #7: Vhamp

Age: Infinite (seemingly 17)

Height: 6’0”

Personality: Smart

Accent: none

Physical Appearance

Has a light green metallic body, brown eyes, a yellow-skinned head with brown wires for hair, a brown-skinned neck, wheels with green insides and yellow treads for feet, three pipes atop his head, wearing a red cap, black-frame glasses, a light green long-sleeve shirt with several yellow dots along the midsection, a set of white, green, red, and blue dots on a black box on the chest, white sleeves with brown horizontal stripes, brown pants with thin vertical gold stripes, and a small scar on his right arm. He blows through the pipes on his head to make a sound akin to a pipe organ.

Celestial of: Mech

CHARACTER #8: Glaishur

Age: Infinite (seemingly 20)

Height: 5’9”

Personality: Tough

Accent: none

Physical Appearance

Has a purple-skinned muscular body, light blue eyes, wavy purple hair, a small peak shaped like a snowy mount
creator: I<3HeavyMetal1970
